author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(Panel): implement widget & mixin (algolia/vue-instantsearch#488)
body:
* feat(panel): implement Provider / Consumer panel mixin

* feat(Panel): add widget

* feat(stories): add Panel

* feat(panel): use function to map state to canRefine

* feat(panel): add a name to the event bus

* feat(panel): add mocks

* chore(Menu): rename test file with a capital

* test(panel): use smarter mock implementation

* feat(Menu): implement Panel support

* chore(storybook): avoid image to shrink

* docs(Panel): add widget

* fix(panel): use beforeDestroy rather than destroyed

* test(Panel): wrap slot value inside a element

* test(Menu): always provide a copy of the state

* test(panel): correctly trigger watcher

* fix(panel): always emit a first time

* chore(Menu): update panel header

* chore(snapshots): rename menu to Menu
